title: αS PFF Clearance Assay Protocol
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"93fei","text":"This protocol details the clearance of αS PFF assay.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Prepare S PFF working solution as above (for 4 μg/ml final concentration).
Wash cells with PBS followed by trypsin (000.5%) for 00:01:00 to remove excess PFF bound on the extracellular surface.
Incubate with fresh media in presence or absence of other drugs/inhibitor treatment for desired duration prior to lysate collection.
creator: Jane Balster
